description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving unit constructed from light-colored wood, featuring four open shelves with no doors or visible hardware. The design is minimalist, with clean lines and a natural wood grain finish, making it suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments. The shelves are evenly spaced, providing ample storage or display space for books, decorative items, or utility objects. The sides and back are partially open, allowing visibility and access from multiple angles, which enhances its versatility. The structure appears sturdy, with solid vertical supports at each corner and a flat top surface. Its neutral color and simple form allow it to blend seamlessly into a variety of urban settings such as sidewalks, parks, or communal spaces.
description: A tall, light wood shelving unit with four open shelves and a minimalist, sturdy design. The open sides and back make it versatile for storage or display in urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves with unobstructed access and a clear view of the interior spaces.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the shelves and the open structure, with partial visibility through the unit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panels behind each shelf, with open sections at the top and bottom.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the depth and open construction of the shelving unit.
